sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Michael Ephesius</hi> Philosophus [Mich.] <date TEIform="date">xi/xii A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">in EN = in Ethica Nicom<*>chea commentarium,</title_> ed. G. Heylbut (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xx), Berlin 1892; <title_ TEIform="title">in librum quintum Ethicorum Nicomacheorum commentarium,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1901. <title_ TEIform="title">in PA = in libros de Partibus Animalium, de Animalium Motione, de Animalium Incessu commentaria,</title_> ed. Graeca</title_> xxii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1904. <title_ TEIform="title">in PN = in Parva Naturalia commentaria,</title_> ed. P. Wendland (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xxii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1903.</item>
